title: Chewy Light Argentinian Celery Salad
description: This earthy and chewy salad features celery salted before poaching in a dairy-free friendly dressing to create a light and vibrant dish with an Argentine twist.
instructions: Chop the celery into thin pieces.
In a small bowl, combine olive oil and lemon zest with salt. Mix well until all salt is dissolved.
Submerge celery in the olive oil mixture and marinate at room temperature for about 30 minutes to 1 hour.
Drain excess liquid from celery, retaining some of the dressing as a finishing touch.
Serve chilled or at room temperature with extra drizzle of olive oil if desired.
